title: Director
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking an experienced and dynamic Director to provide strategic leadership and oversee the overall management of our consultancy business. The Director will be responsible for driving business growth, leading consulting engagements, strengthening client relationships, and ensuring the delivery of high-quality management consulting services. This role plays a critical part in shaping the company’s strategic direction and supporting long-term sustainability.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the development and execution of strategic initiatives aligned with the company’s vision to drive sustainable business growth
  • Oversee daily consultancy project operations to ensure timely delivery that meets client and stakeholder expectations
  • Identify and pursue new markets, clients, and partnership opportunities to expand the business development pipeline
  • Build, manage, and strengthen long-term relationships with key clients, stakeholders, and industry partners to enhance client retention and satisfaction
  • Provide leadership, mentorship, and guidance to senior consultants and management staff to improve team performance and professional growth
  • Develop, manage, and monitor budgets, forecasts, and financial performance to ensure the consultancy’s financial sustainability
  • Review and enhance consulting methodologies, frameworks, and service offerings to maintain quality and foster innovation
  • Analyze industry trends, market developments, and competitive landscapes to inform strategic decision-making
  • Represent the company in high-level meetings, negotiations, and industry events to strengthen brand presence and market positioning
  • Ensure compliance with corporate governance standards, regulatory requirements, and ethical business practices

Required competencies and certifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Management, Economics, or a related discipline
  • Minimum 10 years of relevant experience in management consultancy, professional services, or a related industry
  • At least 5 years of experience in a senior leadership, director, or equivalent management role

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Master’s degree (MBA or equivalent)
  • Proven track record in business development, strategic planning, and client engagement
  • Strong strategic thinking, problem-solving, and decision-making capabilities
  • Excellent leadership, people management, and stakeholder engagement skills
  • Strong commercial awareness and financial acumen
  • Exceptional communication, presentation, and negotiation skills
  • Ability to manage multiple priorities and perform effectively in a fast-paced environment
  • High level of professionalism, integrity, and ethical standards
  • Willingness to travel as required for client engagements and business development activities
